descriptions: Clan Cappello (as Pillera-Cappello) was at war with Clan Laudani.
edges.evidence_quote: La guerra tra i Pillera-Cappello da un lato e gli Sciuto-Laudani e Savasta dall'altro causò numerosi episodi di sangue

descriptions: The Laudani clan supported the Catania faction of Cursoti in the 1991 faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1991 scoppiò una violenta faida, che vide contrapposti da un lato i Cursoti catanesi, guidati da Giuseppe Garozzo e da Santo Mazzei e appoggiati dal clan Laudani (e quindi dai Santapaola , Ferrera, Ercolano e dai Malpassoti ), e dall’altro i milanesi, facenti capo a Jimmy Miano e supportati dal clan Cappello

descriptions: Clan Laudani was initially allied with Clan Pillera, then became enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: quest'ultimi prima legati al clan Pillera e successivamente nel 1986 divennero nemici.

descriptions: Clan Savasta sought alliance with Clan Laudani.
edges.evidence_quote: il gruppo della Savasta guidato da Antonio Puglisi cerco alleanze con il clan Laudani

descriptions: Laudani clan has rivaled Cosa Nostra for decades and now exerts influence over it in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: nella parte centrale ed orientale dell'isola prevale invece una struttura di tipo orizzontale, non più verticistica (« ad assetto variabile », l'ha definita un rapporto della DIA ), sul modello della Stidda e dei clan Cappello e Laudani , che ormai, dopo decenni di rivalità, esercitano un'enorme influenza su Cosa nostra, specialmente nel campo del traffico di stupefacenti

descriptions: Hard Livings has associations with Westbury gang.
edges.evidence_quote: They have associations with Westbury gang, Varador Cortet.

descriptions: Cappello was at war with the clan of Santo Mazzei.
edges.evidence_quote: Massimiliano nel gennaio 1997 rimase vittima di un agguato nella guerra contro il clan di Santo Mazzei " u carcagnusu ".

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: PFLP and RAF jointly planned the Landshut hijacking.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977, Jensen may have staked out Palma de Mallorca Airport in preparation of the joint PFLP/RAF Landshut Hijacking

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated in a cocaine trafficking cartel with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan participated in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate .

descriptions: The Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate in a cocaine trafficking cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan participated in a cartel of 'Ndrangheta families involved in cocaine trafficking with the Mafia family of Mariano Agate.

Salakau.description: Salakau is a secret society and gang based in Singapore, founded in the early 1970s. The name means 'three six nine' in Hokkien, referencing the Eighteen Arhats. They are involved in drug trafficking, extortion, prostitution, and white-collar crime. The gang has a history of violent turf wars and has been targeted by the Singapore Police Force's Secret Societies Branch.

descriptions: Omega recruited members from the Malay Muslim factions of Sio Kun Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: At its inception in 1989, Omega mainly enlisted independent Malay Muslim inmates that were not in any gang, members from pre-existing small-scale Malay groups, as well as members from the Malay Muslim factions of Chinese secret societies, such as Sio Kun Tong, also known as Salakau or 369.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked 18 Sio Yi Ho as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked Omega as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Salakau routinely attacked Sakongsa as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Attacks on rival gangs such as Sakongsa, Omega and 18 Sio Yi Ho were somewhat of a routine occurrence.

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Zero Network.
edges.evidence_quote: it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

descriptions: The Costa cartel's leader eliminated the Valdeblanquez clan in a vendetta.
edges.evidence_quote: Orlández Gamboa eliminó al Clan Valdeblanquez en una vendetta.

descriptions: Muto and Chirillo cooperated in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 dicembre 2010 l'operazione ... hanno permesso di arrestare oltre 70 persone riconducibili ai Muto e ai Chirillo per traffico internazionale di droga

descriptions: Junior Business Boys is an offshoot gang of the Zulu Warriors.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zulu Warriors have also seen offshoot gangs created such as the Brew Crew and the Junior Business Boys

Kipps Lane Crew.description: Canadian street gang founded in 2000 in London, Ontario. Operates in the Kipps Lane area of Northeast London, involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, extortion, robbery, burglary, and grand theft. One of the largest gangs in London, monitored by the London Police Service and part of the 'Big Seven' street gangs in the city.

descriptions: Gallico is allied with Sciglitano.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono in alleanza con i Morgante, gli Sgrò e gli Sciglitano

Clan Magliulo.description: The Clan Magliulo was a Camorra syndicate based in Afragola, Italy, operating also in lower Lazio and Caserta. It was considered one of the most powerful Camorra families. Founded by Mario Magliulo, brother-in-law of Casalesi boss Antonio Bardellino, the clan was involved in construction contracts, control of shopping centers, drug trafficking, and a bloody feud with the Moccia clan. It suffered major asset seizures in 1990.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo had very close contacts with Clan dei Casalesi, and Mario Magliulo was a co-founder with Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Magliulo avevano avuto contatti molto stretti con il clan dei Casalesi; uno dei fondatori insieme ad Antonio Bardellino, boss storico dei Casalesi, fu Mario Magliulo, cognato di Bardellino.

descriptions: Gaetano Magliulo led a splinter faction of Clan Falanga, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Gaetano Magliulo, capo della fazione camorristica di Torre del Greco e capo della frangia scissionista clan Falanga

descriptions: Clan Magliulo had direct contacts with the Esposito di Sessa Aurunca.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan aveva anche contatti diretti con gli Esposito di Sessa Aurunca.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo and Clan Moccia were in a bloody feud over a construction contract in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni novanta furono protagonisti di una faida sanguinosa contro il clan Moccia: le due famiglie si contendevano l'appalto per la costruzione dell'attuale Rione Salicelle.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo was a rival in a feud with Clan Moccia in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: probabilmente da un gruppo di sicari al soldo dei rivali dei Moccia, ossia i clan Giugliano e Magliulo , all'epoca impegnati in una faida proprio con i Moccia

descriptions: Magliulo clan killed Vincenzo Moccia, leading to a war that Moccia clan won.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, Mazza's favorite son Vincenzo Moccia, called Angioletto , was killed by the rival Magliulo clan, that led to another bloody war between the clans, the Moccias came out victorious.

descriptions: Clan Moccia replaced Clan Magliulo, indicating a structural succession.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha preso il posto del clan Magliulo , abbattendo di fatto uno dei pilastri del clan Alfieri .

descriptions: The La Barberas went to war with the Grecos after a dispute over a drug shipment.
edges.evidence_quote: The La Barberas murdered Di Pisa and Manzella, triggering a war.

descriptions: The La Barberas cooperated with the Sicilian Mafia in a drug shipment.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1962, mafia boss Cesare Manzella organized a drug shipment to the United States with the help of two Sicilian clans, the Grecos and the La Barberas.

descriptions: The Queensmen were renamed to the Holocaust club.
edges.evidence_quote: The club began as the Queensmen Motorcycle Club based in Amherstburg. ... renamed as the Holocaust Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Kenryu-kai is likely a subsidiary or related group to Yamaguchi-gumi, as Kuwata held leadership roles in both.
edges.evidence_quote: Kaneyoshi Kuwata ... was the third kumicho of the Yamaken-gumi yakuza gang, and second generation kaicho of Kenryu-kai

descriptions: Second kumicho Yoshinori Watanabe was 1st kaicho of Kenryu-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: He was 1st kaicho ( 会長 ) of the Kenryu-kai ( 健竜会 )

descriptions: Mammoliti and Rugolo clans are linked through intermarriage.
edges.evidence_quote: closely linked to the Rugolo clan through intermarriage

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Fontana in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Fontana clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: The Fontana clan allied with the Imerti during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: The Pino and Sena exchanged favors with the Condello and Fontana 'ndrine.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 agosto 1983 a Scalea vengono uccisi taluni Geria e Saffioti come scambio di favori alle 'ndrine del reggino di Pasquale Condello e Giovanni Fontana

descriptions: Accorinti was helped by Damiano Vallelonga in planning retaliation.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Accorinti con l'aiuto del boss di Serra San Bruno Damiano Vallelonga

descriptions: AWB is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... AWB

Romanian Constitutional Bar.description: A parallel, illegal bar association in Romania, established by Pompiliu Bota in 2002, lacking legal personality. It allowed unauthorized persons to practice law, violating Romanian criminal codes. The organization was never legally recognized and operated as a criminal group.

Clan Matrone.description: The Clan Matrone is a Camorra criminal organization based in Scafati, Salerno, Italy. Founded in the 1970s, it aligned with the Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata. The clan exerted near-total territorial control, often substituting for the state, and was involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and violent enforcement. Following the 2012 arrest of boss Francesco Matrone, the group became largely disarticulated, though a faction led by Giuseppe Buonocore attempted to revive its dominance until being dismantled in 2018.

descriptions: Cesarano clan had tension with Matrone clan over territorial expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan went through a period of tension with the Matrone clan

descriptions: Tension between Cesarano and Matrone over control of illegal activities in Scafati.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cesarano hanno attraversato un periodo di tensione con i Matrone, a causa del controllo delle attività illecite a Scafati e dintorni

descriptions: Aquino-Annunziata are historical allies of the Matrone.
edges.evidence_quote: contratto con gli Aquino-Annunziata di Boscoreale , storici alleati dei Matrone

descriptions: The Matrone clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Matrone was at the head of the Loreto-Matrone clan of the Camorra

descriptions: Clan Matrone allied with Loreto and Ridosso families.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Clan Matrone allied with Loreto and Ridosso families.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: Clan Matrone opposed NCO by siding with Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia , cartello criminale nato con l'intento di stroncare le trame e lo strapotere della NCO di Cutolo.

descriptions: Clan Matrone allied with Nuova Famiglia against NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan si schierò, unitamente alle famiglie camorristiche dei "Loreto" e dei "Ridosso" - anch'esse di Scafati - con la Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Matrone clan succeeded the Nuova Famiglia after its dissolution.
edges.evidence_quote: After the dissolution of the Nuova Famiglia, Francesco Matrone, headed one of the most powerful clans

descriptions: Buonocore group sought to restore Matrone dominance.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Buonocore, alias "Zi' Peppe 'e Scafati", genero di Franco Matrone , voleva ripristinare il dominio dei Matrone su Scafati e dintorni.

descriptions: Matrone clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Matrone di Scafati

descriptions: Wood Green Mob killed a former NPK member.
edges.evidence_quote: On 3 February 2018, Kwabena Nelson, also known as Kobi and a former member of NPK, was stabbed to death by members of the Wood Green Mob (WGM) following them crashing into his car.

descriptions: SADAT was accused of transferring funds to Hamas, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Israel Security Agency accused SADAT International Defense Consultancy (a Turkish private military company with connections to the Turkish government) of transferring funds to Hamas.

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
descriptions: Zoe Mafia Family is listed as an ally of G9 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound , Zoe Nation, Zoe Mafia Family
